case_title: FRANK FABIANO ET AL VS. HOA QUOC TO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,475.00 FILED BY FABIANO, FRANK FABIANO-SHARP, GLADYS AS TO DEFENDANT TO, HOA QUOC AKA DONA HUYNH, AKA HUNG T LY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY FABIANO, FRANK FABIANO-SHARP, GLADYS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFFS FRANK FABIANO AND GLADYS FABIANO-SHARP ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT DONNA HUYNH IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER HONG HA (#300215). (PLAINTIFFS' CLAIM HAS PLED DEFENDANT AS "HOA QUOC TO AKA DONA HUYNH AKA HUNG T LY.") HON. PANG LY AMENDS PLAINTIFFS' CLAIM TO DISMISS GLADYS FABIANO-SHARP AS IMPROPERLY PLED AS MS. FABIANO-SHARP IS NOT A CO-OWNER OF THE PROPERTY. GLADYS FABIANO-SHARP IS NOW PRESENT AS A WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF FRANK FABIANO. HON. PANG LY FINDS THAT ONLY DEFENDANT DONNA HUYNH HAS BEEN SERVED IN THIS CASE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF AMENDING CLAIM TO CORRECT THE DEFENDANT'S NAME FILED BY PLAINTIFF FABIANO, FRANK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-01-2023 - CONTINUED FOR VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER TO SEP-29-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FRANK FABIANO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF GLADYS FABIANO-SHARP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HOA QUOC TO AKA DONA HUYNH AKA HUNG T LY IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY FABIANO, FRANK FABIANO-SHARP, GLADYS TO, HOA QUOC AKA DONA HUYNH, AKA HUNG T LY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FABIANO, FRANK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TO, HOA QUOC AKA DONA HUYNH, AKA HUNG T LY DEFENDANT DONNA HUYNH SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF FRANK FABIANO IN THE AMOUNT OF $0.00 PRINCIPAL, $0.00 INTEREST, $0.00 COSTS. PLAINTIFF ONLY SERVED DONNA HUYNH AND PRESENTED ONLY EVIDENCE AS TO BUSINESS 7 NAIL AND HUNG T. LY, WHICH WERE NEITHER SERVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,475.00 [AMENDING CLAIM TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S NAME - ADDING 'AKA'] FILED BY FABIANO, FRANK FABIANO-SHARP, GLADYS AS TO DEFENDANT TO, HOA QUOC AKA DONA HUYNH, AKA HUNG T LY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40. SERVED JUL-17-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TO, HOA QUOC AKA DONA HUYNH, AKA HUNG T LY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2023 - JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: DONNA HUYNH CAME IN TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AND ATTEMPTED TO PICK UP THE COURT DOCUMENTS AND LATER REFUSED TO ACCEPT IT BECAUSE THE LAST NAME DID NOT MATCH. FILED BY PLAINTIFF FABIANO, FRANK FABIANO-SHARP, GLADYS AS TO DEFENDANT TO, HOA QUOC AKA DONA HUYNH, AKA HUNG T LY
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF FABIANO, FRANK FABIANO-SHARP, GLADYS
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-01-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-25-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
